title: France Travail Scraper
description: Scrape job listings from France Travail (francetravail.fr). Provide a start URL or use keyword/location search parameters.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: Start scraping from a specific France Travail search URL. If provided, keyword and location are ignored.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location filter for job search, e.g., 'Paris', 'Lyon', '75 - Paris'.

contractType.title: Contract Type
contractType.description: Filter by contract type (e.g., CDI, CDD, Intérim). Leave empty for all types.

collectDetails.title: Collect job details
collectDetails.description: If enabled, scraper visits each job detail page for full description, salary, skills, etc.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of results
results_wanted.description: The maximum number of job listings to collect.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: A safety cap on the number of listing pages to visit.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy for reliable scraping.
